description:
Typically served iced, but can be hot upon request. 
Cà phê sữa đá: Iced 
Cà phê sữa nóng: Hot

Typically served iced, but can be hot upon request. 
Cà phê trứng đá: Iced 
Cà phê trứng nóng: Hot

Almost exclusively served iced, especially in the South where it is hotter. On rare occasions, it may be served hot. 
Cà phê muối đá: Iced 
Cà phê muối nóng: Hot

Typically served iced, but can be hot upon request. 
Cà phê đen đá: Iced 
Cà phê đen nóng: Hot

Almost exclusively served iced, especially in the South where it is hotter. On rare occasions, it may be served hot. 
Cà phê muối đá: Iced 
Cà phê muối nóng: Hot
Bạc xỉu đá is a mild, milky drink with less coffee and more fresh milk. Compared to cà phê sữa đá, which has more coffee and condensed milk.
